description: 4 4 4 4 typhusMEMe less as no new cases are found 2 Day Quarantine iian 011 All Foreign Ships Off Till Sunday KD DEATH REPORTED Ajred Immigrant Who Arrived Week Ago Dies in Hoffman Island OFFICIAL FRICTION ENDS Steamship Lines Cooperate With All Services to Ward Off Disease Although the third death from typhus fever occurred here yesterday no new cases were reported and the fact that the United States Public Health Service believes there is no immediate danger of the plague spreading to this country was seen in the announcement that the twelve day quarantine ban on all ships from Europe will net go into effect until Sunday It is understood this delay is due to the fact that the Government will not take over the New York quarantine station until the end of the week Other developments were the continued improvement of conditions at Ellis Island the announcement that steamship companies will not oppose any health rules the Federal authorities may decide to enforce no matter what hardship it works against them and the appearance of a better under oianamg oeiween iocai aria iHsnington health officials Under present sailing schedules about twenty transatlantic liners will be delayed
